name: Tellusgruppen AB (publ)
summary: Tellusgruppen AB (publ), through its subsidiaries, operates in the education and childcare sectors in Sweden. The company operates 23 preschools in Stockholm and Uppsala counties under the Tellusbarn name; and 4 primary schools in Enk√É¬∂ping under the Tellusskolan name. It also provides homework help services in Stockholm under the Tellusacademy name; and babysitting services in Stockholm county under the Nanny by Tellus name. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
